_note: Search queries come from watchlist.json. Optional per-retailer 'searchTerms' are appended as extra queries.

ebgames._note: PRIMARY TCG source. Per-store availability via /api/store/SearchStores; status is a red/yellow/green color per store.

londondrugs._note: Per-store availability via the PDP store picker: searches storeSearchPostal, scrapes the store cards, keeps targetStores matched by postal. Status badges seen: 'In Stock' / 'Available for pickup today' / 'Not In Stock'. fetchQuantity=true additionally reads the per-store count ('16 Items in Stock') for in-stock rows, but LD's store state doesn't reset reliably between reads so it only succeeds ~1 in 3 tries and adds a page cycle per in-stock row — left OFF by default.

superstore._note: DISABLED: RCSS lists no Pokemon TCG online (verified — snacks/plush/apparel only; cards are in-store impulse items not listed anywhere online). Nothing to scrape.
